_comment: AI route-generation provider config. The app talks to ANY OpenAI-compatible endpoint, so we're not locked to one vendor in code — this file just chooses the default. We stick to ONE provider here (Google Gemini: free, fast, generous) so a user's single key never breaks; the weekly app-model-review CI job only ever swaps to another model on THIS provider (it never changes base_url). The app falls back to a built-in default if this is missing/invalid.
